name: claude-composed-app
title: Claude App (Mac desktop)
description: The one canonical Claude app, rebuilt against real Claude.app captures (reference/claude/2026-07-13/mac-app-*): Home|Code sidebar tabs, home page with the merged Chat/Cowork composer toggle, chat/cowork session views, and the light Claude Code desktop session pane. Any scene that shows the Claude app. Pages via ?page=home|chat|cowork|code (default home; chat+cowork are one page in the real app - the composer pill picks the mode). data-sidebar="off" gives the sidebar-less pane (replaces claude-chat-pane), data-rail toggles the cowork agent rail, theme-dark supported. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
